uplink.description: ELT Ultrasonic onboard temperature + humidity, accelerometer, pressure and ultrasonic distance (TTN example input)
uplink._note: Input bytes are the upstream TTN example for elsys/elt-ultrasonic; expected.data was produced via the ORACLE method by running reference/upstream-codec.js and normalizing per AUTHORING.md (onboard temp+humidity -> air; accelerometer x/y/z, raw pressure value/1000, and ultrasonic distance mm kept as camelCase extras since the vocabulary has no level/distance/out-of-bounds-pressure key).

uplink.description: ELT Ultrasonic with battery (VDD mV -> volts), light (lux) and ultrasonic distance
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload (TEMP 21.5 C, RH 55%, LIGHT 350 lux, VDD 3600 mV, EXT_DISTANCE 1200 mm). expected.data confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js via the ORACLE method: upstream emits {temperature:21.5,humidity:55,light:350,vdd:3600,distance:1200}; normalization maps temp/humidity/light into air, VDD mV -> battery volts (/1000), distance mm -> extra.

uplink.description: unknown Elsys type stops decoding; recognized fields kept, remainder warned
uplink._note: Synthetic: TEMP 21.5 C followed by unrecognized type 0x99. Upstream skips to end of stream on unknown types; this codec stops at the unknown type, keeps the decoded TEMP, and attaches a warning. The warning is declared in expected.warnings per the conformance contract (data vectors emitting warnings must declare them).
Synthetic error case: no bytes to decode.
